prompt: A finely ornate medieval fantasy sword planted deeply in rocky, desolate ground in sharp focus, foreground center. The sword features an intricately decorated crossguard with flowing patterns and a leather-wrapped handle. In the soft-focused background, a lone warrior in tattered medieval clothing stands gazing at massive gothic ruins—crumbling stone archways and towering architecture of a once-grand castle or fortress. The setting is a barren, apocalyptic landscape with scattered rocks and dust. Clear golden-hour sky overhead. Cinematic depth of field with dramatic lighting. Mood: epic, melancholic, triumphant loss. High fantasy aesthetic, photorealistic rendering.
